description:
Status of the aircraft tail number or callsign in the FAA Limiting Aircraft Data Displayed (LADD) Program list.
See https://www.faa.gov/pilots/ladd for more details.

isBlocked.description: Current status of the aircraft / flight in the FAA LADD industry list.

blockedSince.description:
For blocked aircraft only: the date when the aircraft / flight was blocked.
Will not be included for blocked dates at or prior to September 15, 2024.

lastBlockedOn.description:
For unblocked aircraft only: the date when the aircraft / flight was last blocked.
Will not be included for blocked dates at or prior to September 15, 2024 or 
for the aircraft that were never blocked.

name: FaaLaddAircraftStatusContract
